channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-15386] sanity test_150bb: Delete is not completed in 40 seconds
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Dongyang Li <dongyangli@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/b0302542-c85d-4245-9a74-e001debf68cb

test_150bb failed with the following error:

test_150bb returned 1

osd-ldiskfs.lustre-OST0001.fallocate_zero_blocks=0
osd-ldiskfs.lustre-OST0002.fallocate_zero_blocks=0
osd-ldiskfs.lustre-OST0003.fallocate_zero_blocks=0
osd-ldiskfs.lustre-OST0004.fallocate_zero_blocks=0
osd-ldiskfs.lustre-OST0005.fallocate_zero_blocks=0
osd-ldiskfs.lustre-OST0006.fallocate_zero_blocks=0
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n os[cd]*.*MD*.force_sync 1
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*MDT*.sync_*
Delete is not completed in 40 seconds
CMD: onyx-120vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.*MDT*.sync_*
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.sync_changes=0
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_flight=0
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_progress=0
osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0000.sync_changes=0
osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_flight=0
osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_progress=0
osc.lustre-OST0002-osc-MDT0000.sync_changes=0
osc.lustre-OST0002-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_flight=0
osc.lustre-OST0002-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_progress=0
osc.lustre-OST0003-osc-MDT0000.sync_changes=0
osc.lustre-OST0003-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_flight=0
osc.lustre-OST0003-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_progress=0
osc.lustre-OST0004-osc-MDT0000.sync_changes=0
osc.lustre-OST0004-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_flight=0
osc.lustre-OST0004-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_progress=0
osc.lustre-OST0005-osc-MDT0000.sync_changes=0
osc.lustre-OST0005-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_flight=0
osc.lustre-OST0005-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_progress=0
osc.lustre-OST0006-osc-MDT0000.sync_changes=0
osc.lustre-OST0006-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_flight=0
osc.lustre-OST0006-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_progress=0

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_150bb - test_150bb returned 1
item.summary: sanity test_150bb: Delete is not completed in 40 seconds

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
Also failed in sanity test_116a, about once per week:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/1bc52d2a-4412-46bc-87fd-367bca72805a

Another failure on sanity test_64d this time:

https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/55f167b1-d8ab-4a6f-bbb8-58916c106487

Delete is not completed in 38 seconds
CMD: trevis-72vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.*MDT*.sync_*
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.sync_changes=0
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_flight=0
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.sync_in_progress=1
